hero.title:
Manage Icons,
Generate Fonts
hero.desc: The open-source icon manager and font generator for designers and developers. Import SVGs, organize into groups, edit colors, and export production-ready icon fonts.
story1.label: Icon Management
story1.title: Select, search, and organize at scale
story1.desc: Import thousands of SVG icons in one drag. Multi-select for batch operations — move to groups, copy, favorite, delete, or export as SVG. Search and filter instantly across your entire library. Dark mode included.
story2.label: Font Generation
story2.title: Every format, one click
story2.desc: Generate production-ready icon fonts from your library. Choose groups, pick formats, set an output path — Bobcorn handles the rest. CSS, JavaScript, and HTML demo pages are generated alongside your fonts.
story3.label: Organization
story3.title: Groups that keep icons in order
story3.desc: Move icons between groups in seconds. Create, reorder, and nest groups to match your project structure. Save everything as a .icp project file and pick up exactly where you left off.
changelog.title: What's New
meta.title: Bobcorn — Icon Manager & Icon Font Generator for Windows & macOS
meta.desc: Free, open-source desktop app to organize, manage, and generate icon fonts. Import SVGs, group and search thousands of icons, edit colors, and export to SVG, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2, EOT — all in one click. Available for Windows and macOS.
